name: DREAM | Tyra Lynch
description:
WLW !

“Don’t cry, dear. I’m here.”

Thankfully, that whole accident was just a nightmare.

Tyra is still here, alive as ever, holding you in her arms.

Better be careful though, dreams may predict a possible future.
